summary: Tested bug fixes for Party Planning Wizard and ConversationalEntry goal cards. Both bugs are FIXED and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) PartyPlanningWizard opens correctly from /celebrate and /celebrate/cakes pages. 2) ConversationalEntry goal cards now call /api/concierge/pillar-request and show success toast. Test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / lola4304

bug_1_party_planning_wizard.details: Clicking 'Plan Celebration' on /celebrate/cakes or 'Plan My Party' on /celebrate now opens PartyPlanningWizard modal. Without login, shows 'Sign in required' toast and redirects to login.

bug_2_conversational_entry_goal_cards.details: Clicking goal cards (e.g., 'Pet boarding') on /stay page now calls POST /api/concierge/pillar-request, creates service desk ticket + admin notification, and shows success toast 'Request Submitted! We'll get back to you about Pet boarding within 24 hours.'

backend_endpoint_pillar_request.details: POST /api/concierge/pillar-request creates service_desk_tickets and admin_notifications correctly. Tested with multiple pillars (stay, fit, care, celebrate, dine, travel).

unified_flow.details: User Action → Service Desk Ticket → Admin Notification flow working correctly. Tickets have correct type='concierge_goal', pillar, category, and status='open'.

verification_evidence.party_wizard_modal: Screenshot shows PartyPlanningWizard modal with 'Who's the star of the party?' step 1 content
verification_evidence.goal_card_toast: Screenshot shows success toast 'Request Submitted! 🐾 We'll get back to you about Pet boarding within 24 hours.'
verification_evidence.database_verification: MongoDB shows service_desk_tickets and admin_notifications created with correct fields
